title: 10 years of AlphaGo: The turning point for AI | Thore Graepel & Pushmeet Kohli
summary: Google DeepMind reflects on the 10-year anniversary of AlphaGo's 2016 victory over Lee Sedol in Go, marking a pivotal moment in AI history. The analysis traces the impact from the match to subsequent breakthroughs including algorithmic discovery and protein folding solutions, establishing AlphaGo as a foundational catalyst for the modern AI revolution.
